videos.title: Unusual Cross Country ski race - Red Bull Bieg Zbójników 2014
videos.description:
Visit http://win.gs/MqRAii for more ski racing!
Red Bull Bieg Zbójników is an unusual cross country ski race in Poland. Racers climb steep pitches and traverse technical lines to be the first to the top of the hill.
_

Experience the world of Red Bull like you have never seen it before. With the best action sports clips on the web and original series, prepare for your "stoke factor" to be at an all time high.

videos.title: Vasaloppet Visma Ski Classics 2019
videos.description:
Vasaloppet started in 1922, but really it is much older than that. The first Vasalopp was carried out as early as 1521 by Gustav Eriksson. During his flight from the Danish king he stopped in Sälen and returned to Mora to lead the uprising against the occupation forces. Gustav Eriksson eventually united the realm and became Sweden’s first king, better known under the name Gustav Vasa. In other words, Sälen is not only the starting point for the world’s largest exercise race; it is also the starting point for the history of our whole country.
#16000человек собрались проехать на лыжах дистанцию в 90км от Салена до Моры #Vasa #vasaloppet #crosscountryski #ski #skimarathon #васалоппет #васалопет #васа #лыжи #лыжныймарафон #visma #vismaskiclassics #🎿 #Sweeden #mora #salen #vasaloppet2019 #worldloppet #skiclassics

videos.title: 🎿 600 zawodników na trasach Podhala! | XIII Bieg Podhalański 2026 | Nowy Targ – Zima Pełna Emocji ❄️
videos.channel: Bieg Podhalański im. Jana Pawła II
videos.description:
Zobacz, jak 600 zawodników rywalizowało w jednym z największych biegów narciarskich w Polsce! ❄️
XIII Bieg Podhalański, który odbył się 17 stycznia 2026 roku, to prawdziwe święto biegów narciarskich i zimowej pasji. Zawodnicy ścigali się na malowniczych trasach w obrębie nowotarskiego lotniska i Rezerwatu Przyrody Bór na Czerwonem, wśród pięknych krajobrazów Podhala z panoramą Tatr i Gorców.
🏁 Na starcie nie zabrakło legend polskiego narciarstwa biegowego — między innymi Justyny Kowalczyk Tekieli, która dodała rywalizacji wyjątkowego charakteru.
💨 Poczuj dynamikę, energię i emocje tego zimowego wydarzenia w Nowym Targu.
▶️ Oglądaj, zostaw 👍 i zasubskrybuj kanał po więcej sportowych relacji!

🌐 Strona zawodów - https://bieg.nowytarg.pl
🏙️Organizator zawodów - Miasto Nowy Targ https://www.nowytarg.pl
🤝 Sponsor Generalny Fischer Polska - https://www.fischersports.com/pl_pl


#BiegPodhalański #NowyTarg #NarciarstwoBiegowe #BiegiNarciarskie #Podhale #SportZimowy #BórNaCzerwonem #Zima2026 #XCskiingPL #BiegNaNartach #crosscountryskirace #crosscountryski #crosscountryskiingcompetition

videos.title: Highlights Birkebeinerrennet 2025 I Ski Classics Pro Tour
videos.description:
🔥 Birkebeinerrennet 2025 delivered an unforgettable race as the world’s top long-distance skiers battled through 54 km of demanding terrain in Norway. This legendary race, part of the Ski Classics Pro Tour, takes skiers across the breathtaking mountain pass from Rena to Lillehammer, carrying the traditional 3.5 kg backpack—a tribute to the historic Birkebeiner warriors.

🏆 Winners of Birkebeinerrennet 2025:
🥇 Men: Andreas Nygaard (Team Ragde Charge)
🥇 Women: Stina Nilsson (Team Ragde Charge)

Relive the most exciting moments, from early breakaways to the intense final sprint! Who had the best tactics? Who dominated the climbs? Watch now to see how the race unfolded!

📌 Subscribe to SC The Ski Community for more interviews, race highlights, and exclusive Ski Classics content. Subscribe Here:    / @sctheskicommunity  

🔗 Discover more about Ski Classics and cross-country skiing:
🌐 Ski Classics Official Website: https://skiclassics.com/
🌐 Längd.se (Swedish): https://www.langd.se/
🌐 Langrenn.com (Norwegian): https://www.langrenn.com/
🌐 Maastohiihto (Finnish): https://www.maastohiihto.com/
🌐 ProXCskiing: https://www.proxcskiing.com/

💬 Join the conversation:
What did you think of this year's Birkebeinerrennet? Drop your thoughts in the comments!

#Birkebeinerrennet #SkiClassics #CrossCountrySkiing #Längdskidåkning #Langrenn #Maastohiihto

videos.title: Basic Classic Ski Techniques: Striding
videos.description:
The Missoula Nordic Ski Club demonstrates a basic technique of classic skiing:
Striding (or 'diagonal stride') - it's like a low gear for starting, easy skiing, and uphills

More technique videos
Overview of All Four Techniques: https://youtu.be/4aQVNyY52Pc
Striding: https://youtu.be/6NST1N6-P28
Herringbone: https://youtu.be/JdvUibe750k
Double Pole: https://youtu.be/BBa2fPziRl0
Kick Double Pole:  https://youtu.be/a7itYppe8xk
Grip: https://youtu.be/I8iGqr9ZZN0

Filmed at Lolo Pass on the Montana/Idaho border
videos.transcript:
there are four primary techniques or
gears in classic skiing and each is used
in different situations
this video is focused on the modern
techniques of classic skiing for use on
groomed trails we won't talk about
techniques for classic ski touring off
of groomed trails
classic striding sometimes called
diagonal stride is the traditional and
stereotypical classic technique striding
is like a low to medium gear in a car or
bike good for starting from a standstill
climbing up moderate hills or when the
snow is slow or deep
striding is powerful but is inefficient
at the higher speeds typical on gradual
uphills flats and downhills
striding is also used for easy relaxed
classic skiing on flat terrain and is
the first technique learned by beginners
in spite of this striding uphill is
deceptively difficult and requires
exquisite balance and excellent weight
transfer it's one of the hardest and
most subtle nordic ski techniques to
master skate or classic
when striding you push with one pole and
drive your body forward to glide on a
single ski bringing your opposite pole
forward at the same time left arm with
the right leg or right arm with left leg
the important thing is that your arm
swings forward in tandem with your body
driving forward
the forward motion of your body should
come from thrusting your hip and knee
forward while pressing downward with the
other foot
propulsion does not come from swinging
or kicking your leg and foot forward
when striding you're never standing with
weight on both skis you are fully
balanced and gliding forward on one ski
then drive your body forward onto the
other to glide and so on
it's easier to stride in
well-established classic tracks but
striding out of the tracks on a groomed
surface is excellent practice for
balance and weight transfer machine set
tracks are also often wider than is
comfortable for striding especially for
people of smaller stature it's totally
fine to stride outside of the tracks
getting good grip with your skis can be
difficult in icy tracks wet snow or on a
steep uphill if you start slipping first
increase the tempo at which you stride
and take shorter steps when even a fast
stride becomes too difficult consider
switching to a herringbone or running
herringbone technique which we'll cover
in a different video
